summary: Iteration 4 testing complete - All color system, content, and structural updates verified. Systems page removed, 'Reserve' renamed to 'Draft', Alliance card fields changed to Clan/Server/Type, emblem/flag PNGs accessible, crimson primary buttons working.
critical_code_review_comments: Color system correctly swapped: crimson #8B0000 is PRIMARY (.btn-primary), gold #C6A85B is SECONDARY (hover states)
Navbar links: white default (text-primary #E8ECF1), gold hover (hover:text-accent #C6A85B) - CORRECT
Discord button uses .btn-primary class (crimson background, white text) - CORRECT
Hero 'Explore Structure' button uses .btn-primary class (crimson) - CORRECT
Systems page fully removed: no /systems route, no nav-systems-link, no nav-mobile-systems - CORRECT
/systems URL falls back to Home page via catch-all route - CORRECT
Clans page heading: 'Autonomous Yazanaki branches across different servers.' - CORRECT
Clans page description: 'Clans are not specialized divisions...' - CORRECT
Clans autonomy note (data-testid='clans-autonomy-note') with 'How coordination works' - CORRECT
Clan cards show 'SERVER · SV-0X' labels (data-testid='clan-server-{code}') - CORRECT
Clan emblem images render from /assets/emblems/{code}.png with .emblem-img class - CORRECT
Alliance card Excalibur shows Clan=SNU, Server=SV-01, Type=Mutual Defense Pact (NOT old Relation/Control/Terms) - CORRECT
Registry status filter has 'Draft' option (NOT 'Reserve') - CORRECT
All 6 emblem PNGs accessible: snu, ano, onf, ona, kasaii, excalibur - CORRECT
All 6 flag PNGs present in /assets/flags/ - CORRECT
No console errors on any page - CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified: (1) Color system: crimson #8B0000 is PRIMARY accent (btn-primary, badge-active, nav-active-marker), gold #C6A85B is SECONDARY (hover states, btn-secondary hover). (2) Navbar: white default (text-primary), gold hover (hover:text-accent), NO Systems link. (3) Systems page REMOVED - /systems falls back to Home. (4) Clans page: new heading 'Autonomous Yazanaki branches across different servers', description 'Clans are not specialized divisions...', autonomy note card (data-testid='clans-autonomy-note'). (5) Clan cards: emblem images from /assets/emblems/{code}.png, server labels 'SERVER · SV-0X'. (6) Alliance card Excalibur: Clan=SNU, Server=SV-01, Type=Mutual Defense Pact (replaced old Relation/Control/Terms). (7) Registry: status filter has Draft (not Reserve), memberStatuses=['Active','Draft','Inactive']. (8) Static assets: 6 emblems + 6 flags in /public/assets/. All pages render correctly with no console errors.
